appName.description: Name shown in Chrome's extension list

appDescription.message: Collects your YouTube Music liked songs so Earprint can analyze your music taste.
appDescription.description: Short description shown in Chrome Web Store and extension manager

step1Hint.message: Sign in once on earprint.kwanho.dev — this popup picks up the token automatically.

step2HintDefault.message: Open music.youtube.com and click sync — Earprint will scroll the page and collect your library.

step2HintNotConnected.message: Connect first (step 1) so the popup can authenticate.

step2HintOnYt.message: Click sync — Earprint will scroll the page and collect your liked songs.

step2HintOffYt.message: Not on YouTube Music — click sync to open the Liked Music page in a new tab.

step2TipDontTouch.message: While syncing: don't scroll the page, switch tabs, or close the window. Earprint controls the scroll for you.

step2TipCountMayDiffer.message: The collected count can be lower than what YouTube Music shows — YT silently stops serving rows past a point on very large libraries. The number you see in your library is the truth.

step3Hint.message: Open the dashboard to start AI analysis and view your music portrait.

msgConnectOpened.message: Sign in with Google on the page that just opened. This popup auto-detects the connection — reopen it after signing in.

msgYtOpened.message: Opened YouTube Music for you. Once the Liked Music page loads, click the Earprint icon again and press Sync.

msgSyncing.message: Syncing… auto-scrolling the page to read your full list.

msgSyncPartial.message: Reached the end at $CAPTURED$ of ~$EXPECTED$ — YouTube's serving limit (last: $LAST$)

msgError.message: Error: $REASON$ — refresh the page and try again
